programs.title: Claire Hooper's House Of Games
programs.desc: Staying over at Claire Hooper's House of Games this week, we've got actor Gyton Grantley, netballer Bianca Chatfield, and comedians Jenny Tian and Nazeem Hussain solving puzzles to earn a toilet seat and also a trophy.

programs.title: Spicks and Specks
programs.sub_title: Lara Goodridge, Brian Canham, Wilbur Wilde & Hamish Blake
programs.desc: Joining Adam Hills are Lara Goodridge, Brian Canham, Wilbur Wilde and Hamish Blake.

programs.title: QI
programs.desc: Sandi Toksvig invites Jason Manford, Sara Pascoe, Jeremy Clarkson and Alan Davies to answer questions on the subject of 'noble rot'.

programs.title: Would I Lie To You?
programs.sub_title: Kevin Bishop, Brian Blessed, Josh Widdicombe And Kate Williams
programs.desc: The award-winning comedy panel show, hosted by Rob Brydon, features team captains Lee Mack and David Mitchell joined by a lively guest line-up. Actor and comedian Kevin Bishop, legendary actor Brian Blessed OBE, stand-up star Josh Widdicombe, and historian Professor Kate Williams all take part, sharing tall tales, quick wit, and outrageous bluffs.

programs.title: Beyond Paradise
programs.desc: A new adventure awaits as DI Humphrey Goodman and Martha leave London for Devon. Humphrey dives into his first case, which involves an unusual prime suspect: a 17th-century witch.

programs.title: Elementary
programs.desc: Sherlock helps a math genius from his network of \.
